case_title: ADRIANA LOZANO ET AL VS. PATRICIA VALDIVIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MANTI HENRIQUEZ. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY LOZANO, ADRIANA DA SILVA, SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT VALDIVIA, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VALDIVIA, PATRICIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 0.00 - SERVED MAR-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDIVIA, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-09-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CURRENT PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFFS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. THE INTERPRETERS' IDENTIFICATION HAVE BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED MAY-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDIVIA, PATRICIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOZANO, ADRIANA DA SILVA, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDIVIA, PATRICIA $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
